author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: sca_finding_validate
summary: Validate a specific SCA finding by fetching the cited file and detecting the JS library version actually present, comparing it to the vulnerable range and the fixed version.

args.--url: Direct URL to the JS file flagged by SCA (required)
args.--component: Component name override (e.g. jquery). Normally pulled from raw_data.package.name.
args.--claimed-version: Version SCA recorded as installed (defaults to raw_data.package.version)
args.--fixed-version: First non-vulnerable upstream version (defaults to raw_data.cached_vuln.fixed_version)
args.--cve-id: CVE identifier for the finding (defaults to raw_data.cached_vuln.cve_id)
